OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WEDNESDAY-JUNE-17-2009: Arnold Walter Evje, counsel appearing for and with plaintiff N.R. Patel; Edward G. Myrtle, limited scope attorney appearing for and with defendant Rochelle Khalil

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 106 Sixth Street, #721, San Francisco, California. The JUNE-22-2009 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
